ATTR_DESCRIPTION.a_around_border: A peak distance to border of image
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.a_r_distance: distance between A peak and next cycle's R peak
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.a_s_distance: distance between A peak and next cycle's S peak
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.adur_edge: Pixel intensity around edge of A peak
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.aduration_intersection: intersection ratio of A peak Aduration with E peak Aduration
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.base_line_ratio: Ratio of baseline to the whole image height
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.baseline_dist: The distance to baseline in pixels
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.cluster_peaks: number of peaks detected in a cycle
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.cluster_prob: average probability of the peak point and valley point in a cycle
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.color_score: The colour score of the EC region
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.confidence_score: The confidence score of annotations (based on video)
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.content_frac: The fraction of the duration since the exam started till it ends
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.convex_area: Area of Area of convex hull hull
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.convex_hull_ratio: The area ratio of original annotation to convex hull
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.cycle_avg_min_prob: Average minimum contour probability of each frame in a cycle
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.cycle_avg_prob: Average contour probability of the cycle
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.dect_edge: Pixel intensity around edge of E peak
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.dias_prob: Average contour probability of a diastole frame
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.dis_ratio: Distance between mitral valve and top of the jet area
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.displacement_window: The max relative displacement on a window of ±10 frames
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.doppler_fill_ratio: Ratio of the doppler that is filled
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.e_around_border: E peak distance to border of image
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.e_r_distance: Distance between e peak and next cycle's R peak
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.e_s_distance: distance between E peak and S peak in the same cycle
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.ecg_r_std: The RR interval relative standard deviation for image
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.frame_curve_error: The volumetric MSE error (ml) for each dia/sys
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.frame_prob: The probability of the contour in a frame
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.frames: The number of frames in the video
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.generated: whether measurement is from generated view
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.height_cm: The height of the img in cm
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.height_ratio: Ratio of peak to baseline and image bottom to baseline
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.is_trapezoid: Whether or not the resulting shape is a trapezoid (0 false, 1 true)
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.max_min_frac: ratio of the maximum measurement value over the minimum measurement value
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.max_min_fraction: ratio of the maximum measurement value over the minimum measurement value
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.max_prob: Maximum determined score for the point placement
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.median_prob: Median determined score for the point placement
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.mes_angle: The angle between the measurement line and the horizontal axis
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.min_dias_frame_prob: Minimum contour probability in the diastole frame
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.min_frame_prob: The minimum contour point probability of a frame
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.min_prob: Minimum determined score for the point placement
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.min_sys_frame_prob: Minimum contour probability in the systole frame
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.neighbor_dist: The distance in mm between closest neighbor point
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.noise_ratio: the ratio of color flow around detected jet area
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.peri_chamber_angle: The angle between LV, RV and PERI
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.prob: Average determined score for the point placement
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.prob_all: Average determined score for the point placement on all frames
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.prob_diff: Difference between Max/Min determined score for the point placement
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.prob_plax: Average determined score for the points on all frames for LVID-IVSD-LVPW, excluding the rest
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.r_a_left_distance: Sistance between A peak and next cycle's R peak
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.r_e_distance: distance between R peak and E peak in the same cycle
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.r_e_ratio: distance between R peak and E peak in the same cycle over the cycle length
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.region_count_2D: The number of ec regions in the dicom
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.s_r_distance: distance between S peak and next cycle's R peak
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.scale_std: The standard deviation of possible scales
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.sd: The standard deviation of pixels inside annotation
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.slope_angle: slope angle from peak to valley in the same cycle
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.sweep_speed: estimated sweep speed based on heart rate and cluster length
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.sys_prob: Average contour probability of a systole frame
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.valley_prob: probability of the valley point in a cycle
ATTR_DESCRIPTION.vc_prob_window: The VC probability on a window of ±10 frames

ATTR_ISSUE.IVSD_LVID_ratio: The ratio IVSD/LVID is deemed incorrect. That usually happens when one of the annotations is too big or too small
ATTR_ISSUE.LVPW_LVID_ratio: The ratioLVPW/LVID is deemed incorrect. That usually happens when one of the annotations is too big or too small
ATTR_ISSUE.a_around_border: A peak is close to the border of the image
ATTR_ISSUE.a_height: A peak height value, the value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.a_r_distance: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.a_s_distance: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.adur_edge: The value must be higher than a specific threshold, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.aduration_intersection: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.area: Area of polygon, the value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.base_line_ratio: Baseline is not at a reasonable location
ATTR_ISSUE.classification_prob: The classification confidence score is deemed too low
ATTR_ISSUE.cluster_peaks: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could mean clutter signal present within the cycle
ATTR_ISSUE.cluster_prob: the value must be higher than a specific threshold, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.clusters_number: Number of cycles present in the DICOM, the value must be within a reasonable range
ATTR_ISSUE.confidence_score: The annotation confidence score is deemed too low
ATTR_ISSUE.convex_area: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.cycle_avg_min_prob: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.cycle_avg_prob: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.cycle_length: The value must be within a reasonable range
ATTR_ISSUE.dect_edge: The value must be higher than a specific threshold, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.dias_prob: The value must be higher than a specific threshold, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.dis_ratio: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.displacement_window: The max relative displacement on a window of ±10 frames is deemed incorrect. This usually happens when the AI annotation isn't stable across frames
ATTR_ISSUE.e_a_distance: distance between E peak and A peak in the same cycle, the distance must be within a reasonable range, otherwise the peak could be a false output from the AI
ATTR_ISSUE.e_around_border: E peak is close to the border of the image
ATTR_ISSUE.e_height: E peak height value, the value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.e_r_distance: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.e_s_distance: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.frame_prob: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.frame_rate: Frame rate too low for analysis
ATTR_ISSUE.heart_rate: heart rate from the dicom, the value must be within a reasonable range
ATTR_ISSUE.height_cm: The height of the image in cm is deemed incorrect
ATTR_ISSUE.height_ratio: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.max_min_frac: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.max_min_fraction: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.max_prob: The maximum annotation confidence score  does not meet the requirements for analysis due to minimally recognizable structures
ATTR_ISSUE.median_prob: The median annotation confidence score does not meet the requirements for analysis due to minimally recognizable structures
ATTR_ISSUE.min_dias_frame_prob: The value must be higher than a specific threshold, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.min_frame_prob: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.min_prob: The minimum annotation confidence score requirements does not the requirement for analysis due to minimally recognizable structures
ATTR_ISSUE.min_sys_frame_prob: The value must be higher than a specific threshold, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.neighbor_dist: The distance in mm between closest neighbor points is deemed incorrect, this usually happens when the AI annotates different measurements too close to each other
ATTR_ISSUE.noise_ratio: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.peak_around_e: Can cause AI failure to detect the true MV-E peak
ATTR_ISSUE.peak_baseline_ratio: peak point height over the baseline height, if the ratio is too high, it could mean the peak is very close to the top of the image, so the peak could be incomplete. If the ratio is too low, it could mean a false peak
ATTR_ISSUE.peak_height: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.peak_prob: The value must be higher than a specific threshold, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.peri_chamber_angle: The angle between LV, RV and PERI
ATTR_ISSUE.possible_misclassification: High probability of misclassification for this image
ATTR_ISSUE.prob: The annotation confidence score is low due to minimally recognizable structures, hence insufficient for analysis
ATTR_ISSUE.prob_all: The annotation confidence score is low across all cardiac cycles due to minimally recognizable structures, hence insufficient for analysis
ATTR_ISSUE.prob_diff: Significant variability in minimum and maximum annotation confidence score
ATTR_ISSUE.r_a_distance: distance between R peak and A peak in the same cycle, the value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.r_a_left_distance: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.r_a_left_ratio: distance between R peak and the same cycle's R peak over the cycle length, this is to evaluate whether A peak is in a reasonable location in a cycle
ATTR_ISSUE.r_e_distance: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.r_e_ratio: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.r_s_distance: distance between R peak and S peak in the same cycle, the distance must be within a reasonable range, otherwise the peak could be a false output from the AI
ATTR_ISSUE.region_count_2D: An incorrect number of regions have been detected
ATTR_ISSUE.s_a_distance: distance between S peak and A peak in the same cycle, the value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.s_e_distance: distance between S peak and E peak in the same cycle, the distance must be within a reasonable range, otherwise the peak could be a false output from the AI
ATTR_ISSUE.s_peak_height: The S peak heigh must be within a reasonable range, otherwise the peak could be a false output from the AI
ATTR_ISSUE.s_r_distance: the value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.scale_std: The standard deviation of possible scale is deemed too large
ATTR_ISSUE.sd: The standard deviation of pixels inside annotation is deemed too large
ATTR_ISSUE.slope_angle: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.sweep_speed: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.sys_prob: The value must be higher than a specific threshold, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.valley_prob: The value must be higher than a specific threshold, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.value: The value must be within a reasonable range, otherwise it could be a false output from AI
ATTR_ISSUE.vc_prob_window: The classification probability on a window of ±10 frames is deemed too low. That usually happens when the video is fading and the structures are not visible across the video

ECHOLOADER.anonymize-dialog-description: We extract and store these dicoms tags. You may choose to remove or pseudonymize certain tags.
ECHOLOADER.combine-studies-description: Combine dicoms from different studies under the same study.
ECHOLOADER.combine-studies-tooltip: Combine dicoms under the same study
ECHOLOADER.combine-studies-unable-tooltip: Can't combine studies if uploading source DICOMs
ECHOLOADER.files-uploaded-in-total: Files will be uploaded in total ({{size}})
ECHOLOADER.help1: Click on the 'Add New Study' button, select the folder containing the dicoms to be uploaded and then click Upload.
ECHOLOADER.help2: Alternatively, you can also drag and drop the folder into the box.
ECHOLOADER.help3: The folder structure does not affect analysis.
ECHOLOADER.help4: Echos must be in the standard DICOM format and can be loaded from your local computer or a network drive. For connections to a PACS server or custom EHR integrations, please contact
ECHOLOADER.help5: Only DICOMs containing imaging data will be uploaded. Secondary captures will also be uploaded but will not be classified nor annotated.
ECHOLOADER.not-uploaded-yet: WARNING: Files have been added to EchoLoader preview but not uploaded yet. Press Cancel to go back and upload, or OK to leave.

ECHOLOADER.select-subject-to-upload: Select subject to upload echos for

FINDING_DIALOG.custom_paragraph_notes_1: 1. Use '{{mes_XXX}}' as a placeholder for measurement value in the paragraph above, 'XXX' refers to the measurement id, replace it with the relevant placeholder in the paragraph.
FINDING_DIALOG.custom_paragraph_notes_2: 2. If a sentence's placeholder measurement does not exist in the report, it will not be displayed. Divide the text into multiple sentences (by pressing 'Enter') for separate placeholder checks.

MEASUREMENT_OVERVIEW.brush: Automatically overwrite AI selected measurements based on customizable rules (right click to update)

MEASUREMENT_OVERVIEW.eye: Show all measurements on selected frame

NOTIFICATIONS.Notifications help:
Hourly: Emails are sent hourly at each whole hour
 Daily: Emails are sent daily at 9am UTC.
 Weekly: Emails are sent every Friday at 9am UTC.
NOTIFICATIONS.notifications-enable: Enable to receive emails for new trials & studies
NOTIFICATIONS.processed-date-warning: Note: Processed date will not be included in notifications
NOTIFICATIONS.select-search: Select search to be notified on

RELEASE_NOTES.bottom-text: for more information and tutorials. This release does not change any existing data or edits made. Release notes can be found by clicking on the app version number in the Subscription section in Settings.

REPORT.Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fr: Heart Failure with Preserved Ejection Fraction (HFpEF)
REPORT.Heart Failure with mildly reduced Ejecti: Heart Failure with mildly reduced Ejection Fraction (HFmrEF)
REPORT.Heart Failure with reduced Ejection Frac: Heart Failure with reduced Ejection Fraction (HFrEF)
REPORT.High Echocardiographic Probability of Pu: High Echocardiographic Probability of Pulmonary Hypertension
REPORT.If any of the above criteria fails: If any of the above criteria fails
REPORT.Increased LAP and grade II diastolic dys: Increased LAP and grade II diastolic dysfunction
REPORT.Increased LAP and grade III diastolic dy: Increased LAP and grade III diastolic dysfunction
REPORT.Intermediate (cannot rule out high) Echo: Intermediate (cannot rule out high) Echocardiographic Probability of Pulmonary Hypertension
REPORT.Intermediate Echocardiographic Probabili: Intermediate Echocardiographic Probability of Pulmonary Hypertension
REPORT.Normal LAP and grade I diastolic dysfunc: Normal LAP and grade I diastolic dysfunction
REPORT.Please correlate clinically: In the pres: Please correlate clinically: In the presence of symptoms and/or signs of heart failure, a left ventricular ejection fraction between 41-49% suggests the presence of heart failure with mildly reduced ejection fraction (HFmrEF). The presence of other evidence of structural heart disease, including raised natriuretic peptides, makes the diagnosis more likely. [Ref: 2021 ESC heart failure guidelines doi:10.1093/eurheartj/ehab368]

Please correlate clinically: In the presence of symptoms and/or signs of heart failure, a left ventricular ejection fraction ≤40% suggests the presence of heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF), especially if circulating natriuretic peptides are raised. [Ref: 2021 ESC heart failure guidelines doi:10.1093/eurheartj/ehab368]

Please correlate clinically: In the presence of symptoms and/or signs of heart failure, a left ventricular ejection fraction ≥50% and evidence of cardiac structural and/or functional abnormalities per table below, suggest the presence of heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF), especially if circulating natriuretic peptides are raised. [Ref: 2021 ESC heart failure guidelines doi:10.1093/eurheartj/ehab368]
REPORT.blood-pressure-number-slash: Warning: Blood pressure should only include number and forward slash
REPORT.fail_to_analyze: View present but unable to analyze
REPORT.field_not_exist: Field does not exist in this study
REPORT.no_gender_warning: No gender provided so conclusions are based on a female patient.
REPORT.paragraph__AMYLOIDOSIS__AMYLOIDOSIS: In the presence of increased LV wall thickness, combined with any of the following — grade 2 or worse diastolic dysfunction, reduced tissue Doppler s′, e′, and a′ wave velocities, decreased LV global longitudinal strain, increased relative LV wall thickness, increased E/e' mean, and/or reduced TAPSE — suggests cardiac amyloidosis. The diagnosis is further supported if amyloid deposits are found in an extracardiac biopsy, accompanied either by characteristic echocardiographic features of cardiac amyloidosis in the absence of an alternative cause for increased LV wall thickness, or by characteristic features on cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR).
REPORT.paragraph__AMYLOIDOSIS__AMYLOIDOSIS_BOTH: Based on the visual patterns observed and known echo measurements, there are some indications for cardiac amyloidosis.
REPORT.paragraph__AMYLOIDOSIS__AMYLOIDOSIS_CNN: Based on the visual patterns observed, there are some indications for cardiac amyloidosis.
REPORT.paragraph__AMYLOIDOSIS__AMYLOIDOSIS_CNN_: Based on the visual patterns observed, the findings are inconclusive or equivocal for cardiac amyloidosis. Echo measurements are insufficient or non-diagnostic. Further evaluation and clinical correlation may be necessary to determine the presence or absence of cardiac amyloidosis.
Based on the visual patterns observed, there is no indication of cardiac amyloidosis.

Required images are not present or of low quality. Echo measurements are insufficient to evaluate or non-diagnostic. Further evaluation and clinical correlation may be necessary to determine the presence or absence of cardiac amyloidosis.
REPORT.paragraph__AORTIC_STENOSIS__DISCORDANCE_: Discordant severity grading is detected in the assessment of aortic stenosis.
It is necessary to rule out potential sources of error leading to discrepancy between Aortic velocity {{mes_130}}, Aortic Pmean {{mes_133}}, AVA by continuity equation is {{mes_359}}.
REPORT.paragraph__AORTIC_STENOSIS__MILD_AS__1: There is evidence of mild aortic stenosis.
REPORT.paragraph__AORTIC_STENOSIS__MODERATE_AS_: There is evidence of moderate aortic stenosis.
REPORT.paragraph__AORTIC_STENOSIS__SEVERE_AS__1: There is evidence of severe aortic stenosis.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_AMYLOIDOSIS__AMYLOIDOSIS: In the presence of increased LV wall thickness, combined with any of the following — RV wall thickening, reduced LV global longitudinal strain with apical sparing pattern, restrictive Doppler mitral inflow pattern, restrictive mitral annular TDI, heart failure with preserved ejection fraction, bi-atrial dilation, and/or pericardial effusion — suggests cardiac amyloidosis. The diagnosis is further supported if amyloid deposits are found in an extracardiac biopsy, accompanied either by characteristic echocardiographic features of cardiac amyloidosis in the absence of an alternative cause for increased LV wall thickness, or by characteristic features on cardiac magnetic resonance (CMR).
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_AORTIC_DIMENSION__ABNORMA: The aortic root dimensions are abnormal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_AORTIC_DIMENSION__NORMAL: The aortic root dimensions are normal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_AORTIC_STENOSIS__INDETERM: The assessment of aortic stenosis is indeterminate.

The aortic valve maximum velocity (AoV Vmax) is {{mes_130}}, and the aortic valve mean gradient (AoV Pmean) is {{mes_133}}, suggesting non-severe aortic stenosis, but the aortic valve area measures {{mes_359}}, which is less than 1 cm².
It is necessary to re-check all measurements to rule out potential sources of error.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_AORTIC_STENOSIS__LOW_GRAD: There is evidence of low-gradient aortic stenosis with impaired left ventricle ejection fraction (LVEF).
The aortic valve maximum velocity (AoV Vmax) is {{mes_130}}, and the aortic valve mean gradient (AoV Pmean) is {{mes_133}}.
The calculated left ventricle ejection fraction (LVEF) is {{mes_125}} by modified biplane Simpson's method.
Dobutamine stress echocardiography is recommended to further evaluate the severity of aortic stenosis.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_AORTIC_STENOSIS__MILD_AS_: There is evidence of mild aortic stenosis.
The aortic valve maximum velocity (AoV Vmax) is {{mes_130}}, and the aortic valve mean gradient (AoV Pmean) is {{mes_133}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_AORTIC_STENOSIS__MODERATE: There is evidence of moderate aortic stenosis.
The aortic valve maximum velocity (AoV Vmax) is {{mes_130}}, and the aortic valve mean gradient (AoV Pmean) is {{mes_133}}.
There is evidence of moderate or severe aortic Stenosis.
The aortic valve maximum velocity (AoV Vmax) is {{mes_130}}, and the aortic valve mean gradient (AoV Pmean) is {{mes_133}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_AORTIC_STENOSIS__SEVERE_A: There is evidence of severe aortic stenosis.
The aortic valve maximum velocity (AoV Vmax) is {{mes_130}}, and the aortic valve mean gradient (AoV Pmean) is {{mes_133}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LA_SIZE__BORDERLINE: The left atrial (LA) cavity size is borderline, with an indexed LA volume of {{mes_120}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LA_SIZE__DILATED: The left atrial (LA) cavity size is dilated, with an indexed LA volume of {{mes_120}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LA_SIZE__NORMAL: The left atrial (LA) cavity size is normal, with an indexed LA volume of {{mes_120}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_DIASTOLIC_FUNCTION__IM: The left ventricle (LV) diastolic function is impaired with elevated filling pressures.
The left ventricle (LV) diastolic function is impaired with normal filling pressures.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_DIASTOLIC_FUNCTION__NO: The left ventricle (LV) diastolic function is normal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_DIASTOLIC_FUNCTION__me: The calculated left ventricle ejection fraction (LVEF) is {{mes_125}} by modified biplane Simpson's method.
The mitral valve E deceleration time measures at {{mes_97}}.
The septal e' velocity is {{mes_110}} and the lateral e' velocity is {{mes_108}}.
The LV global longitudinal strain (GLS) is {{mes_166}}.
The average E/e' ratio, which represents the ratio of mitral inflow velocity (E) to average mitral annular early diastolic velocity (e'), at both septal and lateral regions is {{mes_113}}.
The left atrial end-systolic volume indexed to body surface area (LAESVi) measures {{mes_120}} by modified biplane Simpson's method.
The LA reservoir global longitudinal strain (GLS) is {{mes_1415}}.
The mitral valve L velocity (MV-L) measures at {{mes_406}}.
The ratio of pulmonary vein peak systolic and diastolic velocity (S/D) is {{mes_107}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_GEOMETRY__CONCENTRIC_H: The left ventricular (LV) geometry exhibits concentric hypertrophy, with an elevated LV mass index (LVMi) measuring at {{mes_147}} and an increased relative wall thickness (RWT) measuring {{mes_150}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_GEOMETRY__CONCENTRIC_R: The left ventricular (LV) geometry exhibits concentric remodeling, with a normal LV mass index (LVMi) measuring at {{mes_147}} and an increased relative wall thickness (RWT) measuring {{mes_150}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_GEOMETRY__ECCENTRIC_HY: The left ventricular (LV) geometry exhibits eccentric hypertrophy, with an increased LV mass index (LVMi) measuring at {{mes_147}} and a normal relative wall thickness (RWT) measuring {{mes_150}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_GEOMETRY__NORMAL: The left ventricular (LV) geometry appears normal, with a LV mass index (LVMi) measuring at {{mes_147}} and a relative wall thickness (RWT) measuring {{mes_150}}, both within the normal range.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__ABNORMAL: The left ventricular (LV) size is abnormal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__MILDLY_ABNORMAL: The left ventricular (LV) size is mildly abnormal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__MODERATELY_ABNOR: The left ventricular (LV) size is moderately abnormal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__NORMAL: The left ventricular (LV) size is normal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__SEVERELY_ABNORMA: The left ventricular (LV) size is severely abnormal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__measurements__1: The LV internal diameter in diastole (LVIDd) measures {{mes_143}} and the LV internal diameter in systole (LVIDs) measures {{mes_145}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__measurements__2: The interventricular septal end diastole (IVSd) is {{mes_141}} and the LV posterior wall end diastole (LVPWd) is {{mes_149}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__measurements__3: The LV mass is {{mes_142}}, with a LV mass index (LVMi) of {{mes_147}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__measurements__4: The LV end-diastolic volume (LVEDV) is {{mes_123}} and the LV end-systolic volume (LVESV) is {{mes_126}}, both by the modified biplane Simpson's method.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SIZE__measurements__5: Additionally, the LVEDV index (LVEDVi) is {{mes_124}}, and the LVESV index (LVESVi) is {{mes_127}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SYSTOLIC_FUNCTION__BOR: The left ventricular (LV) systolic function is classified as borderline low, with a calculated left ventricle ejection fraction (LVEF) of {{mes_125}} by modified biplane Simpson's method.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SYSTOLIC_FUNCTION__IMP: The left ventricular (LV) systolic function is classified as impaired, with a calculated left ventricle ejection fraction (LVEF) of {{mes_125}} by modified biplane Simpson's method.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SYSTOLIC_FUNCTION__NOR: The left ventricular (LV) systolic function is classified as normal, with a calculated left ventricle ejection fraction (LVEF) of {{mes_125}} by modified biplane Simpson's method.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_LV_SYSTOLIC_FUNCTION__SEV: The left ventricular (LV) systolic function is classified as severely impaired, with a calculated left ventricle ejection fraction (LVEF) of {{mes_125}} by modified biplane Simpson's method.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_PULMONARY_HYPERTENSION__H: High echocardiographic probability of pulmonary hypertension.
Pulmonary artery systolic pressure is at least {{mes_345}}, assuming a mean right atrial pressure of {{mes_3450}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_PULMONARY_HYPERTENSION__I: Intermediate Echocardiographic probability of pulmonary hypertension. TR velocity is at least {{mes_185}}. Pulmonary artery systolic pressure is at least {{mes_345}}, assuming a mean right atrial pressure of {{mes_3450}}.
Intermediate Echocardiographic probability (cannot rule out high probability) of pulmonary hypertension.
Pulmonary artery systolic pressure is at least {{mes_345}}, assuming a mean right atrial pressure of {{mes_3450}}.

Intermediate Echocardiographic probability of pulmonary hypertension is indicated when peak tricuspid regurgitation velocity cannot be directly measured but is observed alongside other echocardiographic signs, with a right atrial area measuring {{mes_64}} and an increased RV/LV ratio of {{mes_348}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_RA_SIZE__ABNORMAL: The right atrial (RA) cavity size is abnormal, with a right atrial area index measuring {{mes_403}} and a right atrial area measuring {{mes_64}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_RA_SIZE__NORMAL: The right atrial (RA) cavity size is normal, with a right atrial area index measuring {{mes_403}} and a right atrial area measuring {{mes_64}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_RV_FUNCTION__ABNORMAL: The right ventricle (RV) function is abnormal, with a fractional area change (FAC) measuring {{mes_178}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_RV_FUNCTION__NORMAL: The right ventricle (RV) function is normal, with a fractional area change (FAC) measuring {{mes_178}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_RV_SIZE__ABNORMAL: The right ventricle (RV) size is abnormal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_RV_SIZE__NORMAL: The right ventricle (RV) size is normal.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_RV_SIZE__measurements__1: The right ventricular area index is {{mes_404}}, the RV outflow tract (RVOT) proximal measures {{mes_176}} and the RVOT distal measures {{mes_177}}.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_RV_SIZE__measurements__2: The right ventricular internal diameter in diastole (RDIDd) at the basal and mid-point levels measure {{mes_65}} and {{mes_3036}}, respectively.
REPORT.paragraph__BSE_RV_SIZE__measurements__3: The right ventricular length in diastole (RVLd) measures {{mes_330}}.
REPORT.paragraph__CLINICAL_CONSIDERATIONS__HFmr: In the presence of symptoms and/or signs of heart failure, a left ventricular ejection fraction between 41-49% suggests the presence of heart failure with mildly reduced ejection fraction (HFmrEF). The presence of other evidence of structural heart disease, including raised natriuretic peptides, makes the diagnosis more likely.
REPORT.paragraph__CLINICAL_CONSIDERATIONS__HFpE: In the presence of symptoms and/or signs of heart failure, a left ventricular ejection fraction ≥50% and evidence of cardiac structural and/or functional abnormalities where TR velocity is at least {{mes_185}}.
Pulmonary artery systolic pressure is at least {{mes_345}}.
Relative wall thickness {{mes_150}}, suggest the presence of heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF), especially if circulating natriuretic peptides are raised.
REPORT.paragraph__CLINICAL_CONSIDERATIONS__HFrE: In the presence of symptoms and/or signs of heart failure, a left ventricular ejection fraction ≤40% suggests the presence of heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF), especially if circulating natriuretic peptides are raised.

ROUTER_CONFIG.anonymize: Anonymization of data prior to upload
ROUTER_CONFIG.configRestartMessage: Echoloader will restart to apply the new configuration
ROUTER_CONFIG.csv_out: Path to csv file of extracted cases
ROUTER_CONFIG.customer: The customer tag used for the upload
ROUTER_CONFIG.customer_aet: Whether or not customer should be derived from AET
ROUTER_CONFIG.dst: Destination folder or DICOM destination in the format IP:PORT:REMOTE_AE_TITLE[:LOCAL_AE_TITLE:CERT:KEY]
ROUTER_CONFIG.enforce_ae_title: Enforces that users have configured a proper AE title in the UI
ROUTER_CONFIG.extracted: File of cases to ignore - csv file with SOPInstanceUID(s)
ROUTER_CONFIG.extracted_details: Details to use for matching extraction
ROUTER_CONFIG.filter: Inclusive filter for DS files to process
ROUTER_CONFIG.overwrite_tags: Tags to overwrite for specific output modalities, in the format MODALITY:TAG=VALUE
ROUTER_CONFIG.params_pid: The dicom fields to check for patient ID
ROUTER_CONFIG.params_trial: The dicom fields to check for trial
ROUTER_CONFIG.params_visit: The dicom fields to check for visit ID
ROUTER_CONFIG.proxy: Spin up a proxy against env on the given port
ROUTER_CONFIG.pseudonymize_file: Path to file for pseudonymization mapping
ROUTER_CONFIG.save_failed: Path to store failed cases locally
ROUTER_CONFIG.src_glob: Glob expression to apply on src directory
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_annotations: Include measurement annotations and image references in SR document
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_ds_always_render: Always re-render media (required for compressed images)
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_ds_standardize: Standardize output to match study details in Us2.ai
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_edited_status: Attach measurement edit status in SR document
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_from: The time point from which to sync, expression must return datetime
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_generate_uid: Generate a random SOPInstanceUID instead of using the deterministic UID from the backend
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_main_findings: Include main findings in SR export/DICOM encapsulated PDF
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_mapping: Tag for custom mapping to use
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_modalities: Modalities that should be synced to PACS
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_pdf_as_sc: Send PDF report pages as Secondary Captures
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_pdf_images: Include images in DICOM encapsulated PDF
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_regulatory_status: Attach regulatory status in SR document
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_same_series: Use the same SeriesInstanceUID for the same study
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_search: Parameters for sync search, can be used to sync only when special criteria is met
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_stale: Number of seconds that exam needs to be stale before it is synced
ROUTER_CONFIG.sync_url: Include url to measurement page in SR export
ROUTER_CONFIG.tooltip-src_details: Regular expression to apply on path to extract patient details used in the upload request. Can use (?P<key>re) to capture regular expression re to key. Key can be trial, patient_id, visit_id or filename
ROUTER_CONFIG.tooltip-sync_by_measurement: Will cause all PS/SC files to contain just one measurement each, instead of all for the frame
ROUTER_CONFIG.trial: Trial name of studies to upload
ROUTER_CONFIG.trial_id: Trial where all data should be uploaded
ROUTER_CONFIG.use_echoloader_settings: Use the web application echoloader settings for anonymization
ROUTER_CONFIG.watch: Watch the src folder for changes
